snippet.title: Watch NASAвАЩs Perseverance Rover Land on Mars!
snippet.description:
Watch an epic journey unfold on Thursday, Feb. 18 as our Perseverance rover lands on Mars. To reach the surface of the Red Planet, the rover has to survive the harrowing final phase known as Entry, Descent, and Landing.
 
Only then can the rover вАУ the biggest, heaviest, cleanest, and most sophisticated six-wheeled robot ever launched into space вАУ search Jezero Crater for signs of ancient life and collect samples that will eventually be returned to Earth.
 
Tune in to a live video feed of key landing activities and commentary from Mission Control at NASAвАЩs Jet Propulsion Laboratory.

snippet.title: Kurulu≈Я Osman 47. B√ґl√Љm
snippet.description:
47.B√ґl√Љm:
OSMAN BEY B√ЬY√ЬK SAVA≈ЮA HAZIRLANIYOR
√З√ґmlek√Іi ƒ∞drisвАЩin obadaki hainlerin ismini veremeden infaz edilmesinin ardƒ±ndan hainleri ortaya √Іƒ±karmak i√Іin harekete ge√Іen Osman Bey, NikolaвАЩnƒ±n KonstantinopolisвАЩe √ІaƒЯƒ±rƒ±ldƒ±ƒЯƒ± bilgisi alƒ±r. NikolaвАЩyƒ± ele ge√Іirmek i√Іin bir baskƒ±n planlayan ve sava≈Я hazƒ±rlƒ±klarƒ±na ba≈Яlayan Osman Bey, bu kez avƒ±nƒ± elinden ka√Іƒ±rmamaya kararlƒ±dƒ±r. PapaвАЩnƒ±n ajanlarƒ± Melik ve S√Љleyman bu istihbaratƒ±n Osman BeyвАЩe ula≈Яtƒ±ƒЯƒ±nƒ±n bilgisini verince, Nikola, Osman BeyвАЩi ters k√ґ≈Яeye yatƒ±rmak i√Іin plan kurar.  

MALHUN HATUN VE BALA HATUN ARASINDA SOƒЮUK R√ЬZGARLAR
TargunвАЩun √ґl√Љm√Љn√Љn ardƒ±ndan Kumanlarƒ±n lideri haline gelen G√ґktuƒЯ, kutsal emanetleri NikolaвАЩya g√ґt√Љrerek onun g√Љvenini kazanmaya √Іalƒ±≈Яƒ±r. √З√ґmlek√Іi ƒ∞drisвАЩin √ґl√Љm√Љn√Љn ardƒ±ndan g√Љvende olduƒЯunu d√Љ≈Я√Љnen D√Љndar Bey yeni bir ittifak arayƒ±≈Яƒ±na girer. Alpleriyle birlikte u√І b√ґlgesine gelen ve obasƒ± i√Іin yeni bir yurt bulmak i√Іin √Іalƒ±≈Яan Malhun HatunвАЩa Osman BeyвАЩin ilgisi Bala HatunвАЩu rahatsƒ±z eder. Malhun HatunвАЩun bey kƒ±zƒ± tavrƒ± Bala HatunвАЩla arasƒ±nda soƒЯuk r√Љzgarlar esmesine neden olur. 

Nƒ∞KOLAвАЩNIN TAKTƒ∞ƒЮƒ∞ ƒ∞≈ЮE YARAYACAK MI?
Osman Bey, NikolaвАЩyƒ± alt edebilmek i√Іin nasƒ±l bir taktik kuracak? Nikola, Osman BeyвАЩi tuzaƒЯa d√Љ≈Я√Љrebilecek mi? Bizans kuvvetleri ve Kayƒ± alpleri arasƒ±ndaki m√Љthi≈Я sava≈Яƒ±n galibi kim olacak? G√ґktuƒЯ, NikolaвАЩnƒ±n g√Љvenini kazanabilecek mi? D√Љndar Bey, yeni ittifakƒ±nda aradƒ±ƒЯƒ±nƒ± bulabilecek mi? Malhun Hatun planlarƒ±nƒ± ger√Іekle≈Яtirebilecek mi? Malhun Hatun ve Bala Hatun arasƒ±nda neler ya≈Яanacak?
 
O, k√ґm√Љr karasƒ± g√ґzleriyle, gaza ve h√Љrriyet ate≈Яini tutu≈Яturacaktƒ±. 

Adƒ±, ErtuƒЯrul Gazi oƒЯlu OsmanвАЩdƒ±вА¶ 

Karanlƒ±ƒЯƒ±n i√Іinde ona yol g√ґsteren вАЬa≈ЯkвАЭ olduвА¶

Kan ve g√ґzya≈Яƒ±yla sulanan topraklarda, g√ґk ekini gibi bi√Іilen; yedi g√ґƒЯ√Љ, yedi yeri, daƒЯlarƒ±, denizleri a≈Яacak bir milletin r√Љyasƒ±nƒ± вАЬa≈ЯklaвАЭ g√ґrd√Љ.

G√Љc√Љn√Љ kƒ±lƒ±cƒ±ndan deƒЯil, вАЬa≈ЯktanвАЭ aldƒ±вА¶ Zorbalƒ±ƒЯa adaletle; k√ґleliƒЯe h√Љrriyetle direnen, tarihin g√ґrd√ЉƒЯ√Љ en b√Љy√Љk imparatorluƒЯa adƒ±nƒ± вАЬa≈ЯklaвАЭ verdi.

72 milleti kƒ±ran bozuk d√Љzene kar≈Яƒ± ba≈Яkaldƒ±rƒ±, mazlumlarƒ±n sessiz √Іƒ±ƒЯlƒ±ƒЯƒ±na umut, Kurulu≈ЯвАЩun adƒ± olduвА¶

Kurulu≈Я OsmanвА¶ 400 √Іadƒ±rlƒ±k bir obadan, вАЬilahi a≈ЯklaвАЭ kurulan bir cihan imparatorluƒЯuna y√Љr√Љy√Љ≈Я√Љn hikayesi.

snippet.title: VELIKA ILUZIJA 5S 147 EM // Specijal: Dara iz Jasenovca
snippet.description:
U specijalu posveƒЗenom filmu "Dara iz Jasenovca", ƒНija je ekskluzivna svetska televizijska premijera na RTS-u, u "Krupnom planu" je reditelj Predrag Gaga AntonijeviƒЗ.

Zbog ƒНega se film pre zvaniƒНne bioskopske premijere u Srbiji zakazane za 22. april kada se obele≈Њava 76 godina od proboja poslednjih zarobljenika iz logora Jasenovac, prikazuje na televiziji? U kojoj meri su negativni prikazi bili opreteƒЗenje za film u kontekstu trke za oskarovsku nominaciju? Zbog ƒНega "Dara iz Jasenovca" izaziva reakcije i napade onih koji relativizuju zloƒНine? Pored reditelja, u specijalu govore scenaristkinja Nata≈°a DrakuliƒЗ, glumci Biljana ƒМekiƒЗ, Marko JanketiƒЗ, Igor ƒРorƒСeviƒЗ, Nikolina FreganoviƒЗ, Anja StaniƒЗ IliƒЗ, scenograf Goran JoksimoviƒЗ, kompozitori Aleksandra KovaƒН i Roman Gor≈°ek.

Autor emisije: Sandra PeroviƒЗ
Realizacija: Marija AranƒСeloviƒЗ, Svetlana PeroviƒЗ, Marko JeftiƒЗ.

snippet.title: Barcelona vs. Paris Saint-Germain: Extended Highlights | UCL on CBS Sports
snippet.description:
Extended Highlights presented by Heineken 

Mbappe and PSG power past Messi and Barcelona 4-1 in the first leg of the UEFA Champions League Round of 16. Mbappe had one of his best performances of his career notching a hat trick. He opened his day with a goal in the 32вАЩ to tie at one and added two more in the 65вАЩ and 85вАЩ. Moise Kean found the back of the net in the 70вАЩ to help solidify the win.  Messi opened the scoring in the 27вАЩ by way of the penalty spot but that would be all the Spanish side could muster. 

Next up will be the second leg back in Paris, France and Barcelona has an uphill battle in front of them. 

Stream every UEFA Champions League match live on CBS All Access:
http://bit.ly/ucloncbssports

#UEFA #ChampionsLeague #UCL #Roundof16 #HatTrick #MBappe #Kean #Messi #PSG #Barcelona #ParisSaintGermain #Barca (edited)

snippet.title: Zalgiris Kaunas - Crvena Zvezda mts Belgrade Highlights | Turkish Airlines EuroLeague RS Round 24
snippet.description:
In a replay of their rescheduled Round 24 game, Zalgiris Kaunas saved an essential home win by outlasting undermanned Crvena Zvezda mts Belgrade 75-62 on Tuesday. Zalgiris lifted its record to 14-11 as it straddles the eighth and final playoff spot while Zvezda fell to 7-17 with its sixth consecutive defeat, ever further from the same goal. 



ABOUT EUROLEAGUE BASKETBALL 
Euroleague Basketball (EB) is a global leader in the sports and entertainment business, devoted to running the top European competitions of professional basketball clubs under a unique and innovative organizational model. Owned and administered by some of the most successful and historic clubs in the world, EB manages and organizes the continentвАЩs two premier menвАЩs basketball competitions, the Turkish Airlines EuroLeague and the 7DAYS EuroCup, as well as the sportвАЩs premier under-18 showcase, the EB Adidas Next Generation Tournament. 
The EB competitions bring the elite of European basketball to all five continents and to the entire sports community through the OTT platform EuroLeague TV. EB also organizes a series of community and educational programs. Its ground-breaking corporate social responsibility program One Team features all EB clubs that have already made a difference in the lives of over 22,000 participants. Its Sports Business MBA trains future professionals in sports management. 
About One Team 
One Team, Euroleague Basketball's corporate social responsibility (CSR) program, supported by Turkish Airlines as the One Team Founding Patron and with the collaboration of Special Olympics as Proud Partner, uses basketball to achieve real social impact in our communities. With an innovative model of interconnectedness across an entire continent, Euroleague Basketball and its clubs have developed a complete CSR program that brings together activities from each team in an integrated, impactful way, working under the theme of "community integration". Each participating club develops a specific One Team project tailored to its own community needs to benefit groups in danger of exclusion due to problems such as substance abuse and gender, physical or intellectual disability. Since its founding in 2012, the One Team program has reached already directly and indirectly more than 22,000 participants through its various team projects.

snippet.title: Emanet 122. B√ґl√Љm | Legacy Episode 122
snippet.description:
Abone Ol / Subscribe: https://bit.ly/2TLyNnG
Yaman Kƒ±rƒ±mlƒ± is a successful and young businessman who had a rough childhood but never gave up, on the contrary he even became stronger with every obstacle. He started his life from the bottom and became very wealthy. All he has in his world, is a family that he has to take care of after his fatherвАЩs death. He closed his heart to all romantic feelings a long time ago and his only weakness is his 5-year old nephewвА¶ Little Yusuf is very well protected under his uncleвАЩs arms, but he craves loves and sympathy. The only happy image in his mind is his aunt Seher. 
 
Seher is a beautiful and humble girl living with her grandfather. Her life is shaken by the death of her sister who was the bride of the Kƒ±rƒ±mlƒ± family. From now on, she has a legacy she has to take care at all costs: Her little nephew Yusuf. This adventure will arise the long hidden secrets of the Kƒ±rƒ±mlƒ± mansion; while a whole another legacy will start to grow in Seher and Yaman's hearts.

#Emanet
#SehYam

snippet.description:

Yaman Kƒ±rƒ±mlƒ± is a successful and young businessman who had a rough childhood but never gave up, on the contrary he even became stronger with every obstacle. He started his life from the bottom and became very wealthy. All he has in his world, is a family that he has to take care of after his fatherвАЩs death. He closed his heart to all romantic feelings a long time ago and his only weakness is his 5-year old nephewвА¶ Little Yusuf is very well protected under his uncleвАЩs arms, but he craves loves and sympathy. The only happy image in his mind is his aunt Seher. 
 
Seher is a beautiful and humble girl living with her grandfather. Her life is shaken by the death of her sister who was the bride of the Kƒ±rƒ±mlƒ± family. From now on, she has a legacy she has to take care at all costs: Her little nephew Yusuf. This adventure will arise the long hidden secrets of the Kƒ±rƒ±mlƒ± mansion; while a whole another legacy will start to grow in Seher and Yaman's hearts.

snippet.title: Bosanac kupio pravi vlak u voznom stanju
snippet.description:
Mladen CvitanoviƒЗ iz Golubinja kod ≈љepƒНa svjetski je putnik. Bio je najmlaƒСi vojnik Vijetnamskog rata, radio na naftnim platformama, boksao u Norve≈°koj i pobijedio 94 puta. Do≈Њivio je desetak poraza. Njegov djed je bio ≈ЊeljezniƒНar i u spomen na njega kupio je prvo parnu lokomotivu iz ≈љeljezare Zenica u ispravnom stanju a onda i dva vagona od hrvatskih ≈Њeljeznica. Mladen svako jutro trƒНi osam kilometara. Ima svoju teretanu gdje vje≈Њba a proizvodi i domaƒЗa jaja koja prodaje trgovinama i seljacima koji ne ≈Њele uzgajati koke. Mladenova namjera je obnoviti Titov plavi voz koji ƒЗe biti turistiƒНka atrakcija u Centralnoj Bosni, odnosno BiH. Zavr≈°io je i projekt ≈ЊeljezniƒНke stanice a od jeseni za turiste ƒЗe biti na raspolaganju i jedan helikopter za obilazak poznatih turistiƒНkih destinacija. Mladen je u vojsci vozio ne samo helikoptere nego i avione. Svjetski putnik iz ≈љepƒНa ima oko 65 godina ali i toliko ideja kao da mu je 35 godina. Pogledajte ovu neobiƒНnu priƒНu iz Golubinje kod ≈љepƒНa.
Pridru≈Њite se tom kanalu da biste dobili pristup pogodnostima:
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCIu6gtFVDK1u93irvvVrD2A/join

en.title: Bosnian man bought a real train
en.description: Mladen CvitanoviƒЗ from Golubinje, near ≈љepƒНe, is a world traveler. He was the youngest Vietnam War soldier, worked on oil rigs, boxed in Norway, and won 94 times. He suffered a dozen defeats. His grandfather was a railway worker and in his memory he first bought a steam locomotive from the Zenica Ironworks in good condition, and then two wagons from the Croatian Railways. Mladen runs eight kilometres every morning. It has its own gym where it exercises and also produces homemade eggs which it sells to shops and farmers who do not want to grow chickens. Mladen's intention is to restore Tito's blue train, which will be a tourist attraction in Central Bosnia, ie BiH. The project of the railway station has also been completed, and from the autumn, a helicopter will be available for tourists to tour well-known tourist destinations. Mladen drove, not only helicopters, but also planes in the army. The world traveler from ≈љepƒНe is about 65 years old, but he has as many ideas as if he were 35 years old. Take a look at this unusual story from Golubinja near ≈љepƒНe.

ar.title: ўГЎІўЖ ўКЎІ ўЕўГЎІўЖ ўБўК Ў™ЎіўИўГўИЎ±ўИўБЎІ ЎІўДЎ≠ўДўВЎ© 85 ЎІўДЎІЎєўДЎІўЖ 2
ar.description: ўГЎІўЖ ўКЎІ ўЕўГЎІўЖ ўБўК Ў™ЎіўИўГўИЎ±ўИўБЎІЎМ ўКЎ™ўЖЎІўИўД ўЗЎ∞ЎІ ЎІўДўЕЎ≥ўДЎ≥ўД ўВЎµЎ© "ўКўДўЕЎІЎ≤" ЎІўДЎ∞ўК ўКЎђЎІЎ≤ўБ Ў®ЎІўДЎѓЎЃўИўД Ў•ўДўЙ ЎІўДЎ≥ЎђўЖ ўЕўЖ Ў£ЎђўД ЎІўДЎ≠Ў® ўИўВЎµЎ© "Ў≤ўДўКЎЃЎ©" ЎІўДЎ™ўК ўКЎ≠ўГўЕ ЎєўДўКўЗЎІ Ў®Ў≤ЎІўИЎђ Ў™ЎєўКЎ≥ ўЕЎє ЎіЎЃЎµ ўДЎІ Ў™Ў≠Ў®ўЗ ўЕўЖ Ў£ЎђўД Ў£ўЖ ўКЎ®ўВўЙ ЎІўДЎ±ЎђўД ЎІўДЎ∞ўК Ў™Ў≠Ў®ўЗ ЎєўДўЙ ўВўКЎѓ ЎІўДЎ≠ўКЎІЎ© ўЕўИЎґўИЎєЎІ ўДўЗ. Ў•ўЖ Ў≠Ў® ўКўДўЕЎІЎ≤ ўИ Ў≤ўДўКЎЃЎ© ЎІўДЎ∞ўК Ў®ЎѓЎ£ ўБўК ЎІЎ≥ЎЈўЖЎ®ўИўД ўКўГЎ™Ў® ЎєўДўКўЗ ЎІўДЎІЎ≥Ў™Ў≥ўДЎІўЕ ўДўДўВЎѓЎ±. Ў•ўЖ ЎІўДЎіЎІЎ®ўКўЖ ЎІўДЎ∞ўКўЖ ўКўЖўБЎµўД ЎЈЎ±ўКўВўЗўЕЎІ Ў®ўКўЖўЕЎІ ўКўВўИўЕўИўЖ Ў®Ў™Ў≠ЎґўКЎ±ЎІЎ™ ЎІўДЎ≤ўИЎІЎђЎМ Ў≥ўКўИЎІЎђўЗўИўЖ ЎІўДЎІўЕЎ™Ў≠ЎІўЖ ЎІўДЎ£ўГЎ®Ў± ўБўК Ў£ЎґўЖЎІ. ўКЎ™ўВЎІЎЈЎє ЎЈЎ±ўКўВ Ў≤ўДўКЎЃЎ© ўЕЎє ўЕЎє ЎѓўЕўКЎ± ўКўЕЎІўЖ ўИЎІўДЎ∞ўК ўЗўИ ЎІўДўИўДЎѓ ЎІўДўИЎ≠ўКЎѓ ўДЎ£Ў≠Ўѓ Ў£ўБЎ±ЎІЎѓ ЎІўДЎєўИЎІЎ¶ўД ЎІўДЎєЎ±ўКўВЎ© ўИЎІўДЎЂЎ±ўКЎ© ўБўК Ў™ЎіўИўГўИЎ±ўИўБЎІ. ўДўКЎ≥ ўЗўЖЎІўГ ЎіўКЎ° ўДўЖ ўКўБЎєўДўЗ ЎѓўЕўКЎ± ўИЎІўДЎ∞ўК ўКЎ≠Ў® Ў≤ўДўКЎЃЎ© Ў≠Ў®ЎІ Ў®ўДЎІ ўЗўИЎІЎѓЎ© ўЕўЖ Ў£ЎђўДўЗЎІ. Ў•ўЖ ўКўДўЕЎІЎ≤ ўИ Ў≤ўДўКЎЃЎ© Ў≠Ў™ўЙ ўИўДўИ Ў£Ў±ЎІЎѓўИЎІ Ў£ўЖ ўКЎєўКЎіўИЎІ Ў≠Ў®ўЗўЕ Ў®ЎІўДЎ±ЎЇўЕ ўЕўЖ ўГўД ЎіўКЎ° ўБўБўК Ў®ЎєЎґ ЎІўДЎ£Ў≠ўКЎІўЖ Ў≥Ў™ўГўИўЖ ЎєЎІЎ¶ўДЎ© ўКўЕЎІўЖ ўИўБўК Ў®ЎєЎґ ЎІўДЎ£Ў≠ўКЎІўЖ Ў≥ўКўГўИўЖ ЎІўДўВЎѓЎ± ЎєЎІЎ¶ўВЎІ ўДўЗўЕЎІ. Ў•ўЖ ЎІўДЎ≠Ў® ЎІўДЎ∞ўК ўГЎІўЖ ўВЎѓ ЎЇўКЎ± ЎђЎЇЎ±ЎІўБўКЎ© Ў™ЎіўИўГўИЎ±ўИўБЎІ ЎІўДЎіЎІЎ≥ЎєЎ© ўБўК ЎєЎІўЕ 1970 ЎМ Ў≥ўКЎ®ўВўЙ Ў±ўЗўКўЖЎ© ЎІўДЎ≠Ў≥ЎІЎ®ЎІЎ™ ЎЇўКЎ± ЎІўДўЕЎЇўДўВЎ© ўИ Ў≠Ў±ўИЎ® ЎІўДўВўИЎ©.

snippet.title: Kurulu≈Я Osman 46. B√ґl√Љm
snippet.description:
46.B√ґl√Љm:
TARGUN KA√ЗMAYI BA≈ЮARIYOR

Pe≈Яinde olduƒЯu emanetleri eline ge√Іiren ve Bala, Hazal, Lena hatunlarla birlikte D√Љndar BeyвАЩi esir alan Targun; Kayƒ± Obasƒ±вАЩndan ka√Іmayƒ± ba≈Яarƒ±r. NikolaвАЩnƒ±n tuzaƒЯƒ±na d√Љ≈Яen ve Bamsƒ± BeyвАЩle birlikte √ґl√Љm kalƒ±m sava≈Яƒ± veren Osman Bey, Malhun HatunвАЩun s√Љrpriz desteƒЯi ile Bizans saldƒ±rƒ±sƒ±nƒ± savu≈Яturur. Flatyos ve askerlerinin tuzaƒЯƒ±na d√Љ≈Яen Savcƒ± Bey ve oƒЯlu Bayhoca ise son g√Љc√Љyle direnmektedir.

MALHUN HATUN PLANLARI ALT √ЬST EDƒ∞YOR
T√Љrk kaƒЯanlarƒ±ndan gelen emanetlerin TargunвАЩun eline ge√Іmesi b√Љy√Љk ≈Яok yaratƒ±rken; Osman Bey emanetleri geri almak ve Bala Hatun ba≈Яta olmak √Љzere t√Љm esirleri kurtarmak i√Іin zekice bir plan kurar. Malhun Hatun ve alplerinin desteƒЯi ise NikolaвАЩnƒ±n planlarƒ±nƒ± deƒЯi≈Яtirmesine neden olacaktƒ±r.

Nƒ∞KOLAвАЩNIN YENƒ∞ PLANI NE OLACAK?
Malhun HatunвАЩun geli≈Яi ve Osman BeyвАЩe desteƒЯi dengeleri nasƒ±l deƒЯi≈Яtirecek? Osman Bey, Bala HatunвАЩu ve esirleri kurtarmak i√Іin ne yapacak? T√Љrk kaƒЯanlarƒ±nƒ±n emanetlerini ele ge√Іiren Targun, elindeki kozu nasƒ±l kullanacak? Planlarƒ± sekteye uƒЯrayan Nikola nasƒ±l pozisyon alacak? Savcƒ± Bey ve BayhocaвАЩnƒ±n akƒ±beti ne olacak? D√Љndar BeyвАЩin planƒ± ba≈Яarƒ±ya ula≈Яacak mƒ±? G√ґktuƒЯ, TargunвАЩa engel olabilecek mi?

O, k√ґm√Љr karasƒ± g√ґzleriyle, gaza ve h√Љrriyet ate≈Яini tutu≈Яturacaktƒ±. 

Adƒ±, ErtuƒЯrul Gazi oƒЯlu OsmanвАЩdƒ±вА¶ 

Karanlƒ±ƒЯƒ±n i√Іinde ona yol g√ґsteren вАЬa≈ЯkвАЭ olduвА¶

Kan ve g√ґzya≈Яƒ±yla sulanan topraklarda, g√ґk ekini gibi bi√Іilen; yedi g√ґƒЯ√Љ, yedi yeri, daƒЯlarƒ±, denizleri a≈Яacak bir milletin r√Љyasƒ±nƒ± вАЬa≈ЯklaвАЭ g√ґrd√Љ.

G√Љc√Љn√Љ kƒ±lƒ±cƒ±ndan deƒЯil, вАЬa≈ЯktanвАЭ aldƒ±вА¶ Zorbalƒ±ƒЯa adaletle; k√ґleliƒЯe h√Љrriyetle direnen, tarihin g√ґrd√ЉƒЯ√Љ en b√Љy√Љk imparatorluƒЯa adƒ±nƒ± вАЬa≈ЯklaвАЭ verdi.

72 milleti kƒ±ran bozuk d√Љzene kar≈Яƒ± ba≈Яkaldƒ±rƒ±, mazlumlarƒ±n sessiz √Іƒ±ƒЯlƒ±ƒЯƒ±na umut, Kurulu≈ЯвАЩun adƒ± olduвА¶

Kurulu≈Я OsmanвА¶ 400 √Іadƒ±rlƒ±k bir obadan, вАЬilahi a≈ЯklaвАЭ kurulan bir cihan imparatorluƒЯuna y√Љr√Љy√Љ≈Я√Љn hikayesi.

Abone Olmak i√Іin ; https://bit.ly/2t8pQdU
